subject: Spa Reel concept — Thornton Park location
body:
The Eola Drive location is one of the better-lit spa spaces in downtown Orlando — the kind of natural light that makes treatment content look editorial without any extra effort.

I'm Mal, an Orlando UGC creator. I produce photo and video assets for wellness brands that use them on social and in ads. Work is at https://worldwidewmal.com.

The concept: a 30-second Reel for Allora — a Hot Stone treatment sequence that uses that Thornton Park window light. Soft, unhurried, exactly the tone your brand already carries. The kind of content that turns a viewer into a booking.

Would this be useful for your content calendar?

— Mal
